nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel, and tell them that they shall make for themselves tassels on the corners of their garments throughout their generations, and that they shall put on the tassel of each corner a cord of blue.

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel, and tell them to make tassels on the corners of their garments throughout their generations, and to put a cord of blue on the tassel of each corner.

cnv.text: “你要告訴以色列人，叫他們世世代代在自己衣服的邊上作繸子，又在繸子上，釘上一根藍色的細帶子；

ccb.text: “你要吩咐以色列人世世代代在衣角缝上穗子，穗子上系一条蓝色细带。
